ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weapons" (
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weapon */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the weapon */,
  "atk" INTEGER /* Attack value of the weapon */,
  "mat" INTEGER /* Magic attack value of the weapon */,
  "skill_bonus" TEXT /* Skills or bonuses associated with the weapon */,
  "forgeable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the weapon can be forged */,
  "recycle_result" TEXT /* Result of recycling the weapon */,
  "requirements" TEXT /* Requirements needed for crafting the weapon */,
  "buy_price" REAL /* Price to buy the weapon in the game */,
  "sell_price" REAL /* Price to sell the weapon in the game */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the weapon (Common, Rare, Epic, etc.) */,
  "weapon_type" TEXT /* Type of the weapon (Sword, Bow, Staff, etc.) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the weapon */,
  "durability" INTEGER /* Durability of the weapon */,
  "level_requirement" INTEGER /* Minimum level required to equip the weapon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weapon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_costs" (
  "material_cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material cost */,
  "material" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_cost_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_recipes" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe */,
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the weapons table */,
  "material_cost_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the material costs table */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of material required for crafting */,
  "crafting_time" INTEGER /* Time required to craft the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recycling_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recycling result */,
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the weapons table */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material obtained from recycling */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of material obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_inventories" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the weapons table */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the player's inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "weapon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic entry */,
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the weapons table */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the players table */,
  "playtime" INTEGER /* Playtime of the player */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills by the player */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the player */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the player */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the players table */,
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the weapons table */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (buy, sell, recycle) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id")
)
